name: kbd
title: BTKbd
description: Keyboard key badge for displaying shortcut keys or hotkey combinations. Web-only (no Flutter equivalent — keyboard shortcuts are a desktop/web concept).

files.content:
<!--
  BTKbd — keyboard key badge.

  ## Usage:
  ```vue
  <BTKbd>⌘</BTKbd>
  <BTKbd dark>K</BTKbd>
  <BTKbdGroup>
    <BTKbd>Ctrl</BTKbd>
    <BTKbd>K</BTKbd>
  </BTKbdGroup>
  ```
-->
<script setup lang="ts">
import './BTKbd.css';
import type { BTKbdProps } from './BTKbd.types';

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<BTKbdProps>(), {
  variant: 'text',
  dark: false,
});
</script>

<template>
  <kbd
    data-slot="kbd"
    :class="[
      'bt-kbd',
      props.variant === 'icon' && 'bt-kbd--icon',
      props.dark && 'bt-kbd--dark',
    ]"
  >
    <slot />
  </kbd>
</template>
